title: alchornea coelophylla
intro: Alchornea coelophylla, also known as the 'Tropical Alchornea', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Alchornea coelophylla include the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use in treating cancer and HIV/AIDS. Alchornea coelophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its usage should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
